creator: ue@nathan.ruhr.de
text:
Almost all instaces of <filename>some.host.name</filename> were replaced
by <hostid role="fqdn">some.host.name</hostid> in revision 1.87.
One was left behind. Let's end his suffering...

While I'm here, slap <application> around various instances of
sendmail and <filename> around sendmail.cf.

Fix: (tested by make)
How-To-Repeat: 
read doc/en_US.ISO_8859-1/books/faq revision 1.133
(Found during translation/integration of changes from 1.87)
